content.query:
SELECT distinct
calls.id as CALL_ID
,calls.CallDate as CALL_DATETIME
,callTypes.Descr as CALL_TYPE
,calls.emp_id as AGENT_ID
,emp.FirstName + ' ' + emp.LastName as AGENT_DISPLAY_NAME
,calls.cst_id as CUSTOMER_ID
,cust.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cust.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cust.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cust.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'Sales' as JOURNEY_SEGMENT
,callResults.Descr as CALL_DISPO
,CASE WHEN callResults.Descr = 'TEXT SENT' THEN 'Text' ELSE 'Call' END as CONTACT_METHOD
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,'FHI' as BRAND_NAME
,emp.Email as AGENT_EMAIL
FROM
ODS.LP_FHI_cls_calls calls
INNER JOIN ODS.LP_FHI_clr_CallResults callResults
ON calls.ResultCode = callResults.ID
LEFT JOIN ODS.LP_FHI_cty_CallTypes callTypes
ON calls.cty_id = callTypes.ID
LEFT JOIN ODS.LP_FHI_cst_Customers cust
ON calls.cst_id = cust.id
LEFT JOIN ODS.LP_FHI_emp_Employees emp
ON calls.emp_id = emp.id
WHERE
datediff(HOUR, dbo.fnConvertESTToUTC(calls.CallDate), getdate()) between 0 and 2
and callResults.Descr = 'Appointment Set'
